text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Are you really gonna do this? You don't need to
force yourself to like them, you know?

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
No. A princess is kind to all animals! I'll get over
my fear of frogs through sheer willpower!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: I really loved the story The Frog Prince when I was little. I even went searching for a frog myself! But when it jumped straight onto my face...

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
I was so surprised at how slimy it felt that I
fainted! But that was then, this is now!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Okay! Hurry and show me that familiar of yours!
T-t-t-today I'll stand unfazed!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Whatever you say! Gimme one sec to open
the—waaah!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Th-this was a m-m-mistake! I can't do thiiis!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Kawakami! Where are you going?! I already took
it off you!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Wheeze! Gasp! Huh? I feel a bit lighter all of a sudden...

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Grrr... Okay, I wasn't totally unfazed, but surely I made some progress! ...Right?

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Wait... where exactly am I? I must've run really
far...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, Kawakami Princess begins heading back
from wherever she ran off to. But all that running
seems to have been good for her health!
